summary: Complete testing of 3 new TaskAct enhancements: 1) Dashboard FAB button, 2) Daily recurring tasks with exclude days, 3) Every Working Day (Mon-Sat) recurrence type. All backend API tests passed (13/13). All frontend UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (Dashboard FAB): Fixed button at bottom-20 right-6 with data-testid='fab-create-task'. Uses Plus icon from lucide-react. Navigates to /create-task on click. Works on both desktop (x=1840, y=944) and mobile (x=310, y=708) viewports.

Feature 2 (Daily Exclude Days): CreateTask.js shows 7 day checkboxes (Mon-Sun) when recurrence_type='daily'. Backend generate_recurring_dates() correctly reads config.exclude_days and skips those weekdays.
Feature 3 (Every Working Day): New recurrence_type='every_working_day' option in dropdown. Backend skips Sunday (weekday 6) for this type. Verified no Sunday tasks are created.
Regression: All existing recurrence types (weekly, fortnightly, monthly, half_yearly, annually, custom_day_of_month, custom_day_of_week) still work correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test tasks created and cleaned up during testing (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features fully tested and working: 1) Dashboard FAB button (data-testid='fab-create-task') at bottom-right navigates to /create-task. 2) Daily recurring tasks now support exclude_days config - UI shows 7 checkboxes (data-testid='exclude-{day}'). 3) New 'every_working_day' recurrence type generates Mon-Sat tasks only. All 9 recurrence types available: daily, every_working_day, weekly, fortnightly, monthly, half_yearly, annually, custom_day_of_month, custom_day_of_week.
